title: Build GameTora snapshot fetch pipeline
description:
Create the core sync infrastructure that fetches GameTora's manifest, compares content hashes against local data-manifest.json, and re-fetches only changed keys. This replaces the entity catalog role currently handled by master.mdb extraction.

Must fetch and store: skills, character-cards, support-cards, training events, and dict data. Store as-is in GameTora's flat format with loc.en overrides intact. Write data-manifest.json tracking synced hashes.

Implement as 'bun run sync:data' command.

See ADR-0001 for the design rationale.

title: Add skill simulatability validation layer
description:
Skills from upcoming/future content may contain condition tokens or effect types the current simulation engine doesn't recognize. The condition parser crashes at runtime on unknown tokens (undefined lookup) rather than failing gracefully.

Need a validation layer that:
1. Checks each skill's condition/precondition strings against the parser's known condition tokens
2. Tags skills that fail validation as non-simulatable
3. Guards buildSkillData so a single unparseable skill doesn't crash the entire sim run
4. Makes the simulatable/non-simulatable distinction available to UI consumers

This unblocks safely displaying upcoming content while preventing sim crashes.
design:
Approach:
- Export known condition token set from defaultConditions (Object.keys)
- Add extractConditionTokens() utility that tokenizes a condition string
- Add isSimulatable(skill) to SkillService — validates alternatives' conditions against known tokens
- Add try-catch guard in buildSkillData as safety net — log warning, return empty triggers on parse failure
- Simulatable flag derived at runtime from condition map, not stored in JSON

Display vs Simulation boundary:
- Display features (charts, search, filtering): show ALL skills, badge non-simulatable
- Simulation features (compare mode, skill planner): silently exclude non-simulatable
close_reason: Implemented: knownConditionTokens set, extractConditionTokens tokenizer, isSimulatable/filterSimulatable/getUnsupportedTokens on SkillService, safety guard in buildSkillData. 17 tests passing.
